03-pulled-tree.title: Inspect pulled workspace
03-pulled-tree.body: The NYPL mock catalog has been pulled into a local filesystem workspace with catalog, branch, author, shelf, item, collection, and loan-policy YAML files.

04-git-log-proof.title: Prove git has the snapshot
04-git-log-proof.body: The UI history row agrees with git log, git show, and git cat-file assertions from the same deterministic repository.
